deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. $199K purchase, $65K rehab, $340K ARV, $42-62K profit. Closed May 1, 2026. CMA template build in progress.
deals.next: Chris pull MLS comps and RPR report, feed to Sirhc for branded analysis sheet

logs.m: Investor sent deal via link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/acreage development opportunity. Listing expired/canceled. Isaac Linares development interest (~$150K offer) did not move forward. Sisters ended listing after March deadline.
deals.next: Deal closed - signs picked up, listing canceled

logs.m: Listing terminated. Chris walking away. Signs retrieved.
Isaac discussed mobile home development concept - 10 acres, half for veterans, half for profit

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 3 bed/2 bath residential, 2,972 sqft including converted garage. Underwater $93-143K. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs before relisting.
deals.next: Mutual termination complete - relist after repairs

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in. Plan to relist after repairs.
Called sellers - honest approach on short sale path. Chandler was laid off. Relationship intact, ended on good terms.
Full market analysis sent. CMA showed $350-400K realistic vs $493K payoff. Three paths presented.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3 bed/2.5 bath, 1,886 sqft, 2011 build. Laura Heights PUD. Seller relocating to NC, June deadline. Second-look buyers hot lead. Listed $259,900.
deals.next: Follow up with second-look buyers agent - get decision by June

logs.m: Second-look buyers favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled showing to May 30.
Investor cash offer at $176,300 discussed. Kept conversation open with Jose and Katy.
MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. Neighborhood canvass complete. First showing 9:15am.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG Photography - 43 photos plus floorplans.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3 bed/2 bath, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Frio County, Pearsall ISD. Payoff ~$257K. Divorce situation. Colton looking for contractor work at Priority Bank property.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing. Confirm acreage and renovation status.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026. CMA and net sheet completed.
Prior clients from VA renovation loan purchase. Going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank REO. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring this week. Water meter pending. Contractor: Matt Toney (San Antonio Remodelers).
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD to confirm utility status. Police reports still pending.

logs.m: Installed 3 cameras. Electricians reconnected pole to meter. Drywall complete, paint finishing. Flooring starts tomorrow. Water meter 1-2 days out.
Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Need status update email to Kelly, Jerry, Ray.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. A-735 S-46. Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113,000. Waiting on EMD and signed TXR 1903 amendment from buyer agent Javier. Chicago Title escrow open with Alyssa Castillo.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received and signed amendment back from Javier

logs.m: New buyers: Espinoza family. TXR 1903 sent to Javier. EMD not yet received. Another agent flagged for backup offer.
Steve signed price amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Commission box correction still needed.
Clearing complete. Steve sent new photos. Drone footage next priority.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction. $152,000 contract with military buyer. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21. Closed and funded Apr 27, 2026.
deals.next: Deliver Joy gift basket, rug, trolley. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Post-close follow-up.

logs.m: Transaction officially confirmed closed and funded.
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo. Delivered to Chicago Title. Joy signed at UPS Store.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo (lien holder family). Understanding and willing to work with us.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Out of Corpus deal. Still searching. Previously interested in new construction with rate buydowns. Rental being sold by landlord. Evaluated 916 Marriott - pass due to foundation issues.
leads.next: Re-engage on new construction search if Saxet deal fell through

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Paying $1,700/mo rent. Military retirement income plus daughters do disability checks. Between jobs. Fixing credit proactively. VA loan eligible, zero down. Nextdoor contact from High Country neighborhood.
leads.next: Call today - check on grandkid first, then confirm timeline and connect with VA lender

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration with permission. Real estate potential through trust-based relationship.
leads.next: Follow up - ask permission to share story for content

leads.title: Bryce + Wife (VA Buyer)
leads.detail: Dumpster contractor at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, recently moved from Ohio. Currently renting. VA eligible, strong buying power. Met in person on job site.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info next time on site at 181 CR. Connect with VA lender.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner (Buyer)
leads.detail: Downline agent in Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property that needs work. Unique situation caught up on May 11.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer and property

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - helped Brandon get into real estate. Green Bliss rental property for uncle (Jimbo). Mom (Milagros) is new construction buyer. Grace Gardens angle - Lennar, DR Horton, MI Homes communities.
leads.next: New construction buyer agreement with Milagros. Set up builder visits. Register as agent on first visit.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer (Brandon's Mom)
leads.detail: Brandon Moran mother. New construction buyer. $50K down, target ~$1,000/mo payment. Not locked to Grace Gardens - exploring all builders. Rate buydown angle key to qualifying power.
leads.next: Get buyer rep signed. Confirm pre-approval status with lender. Schedule builder visits.

leads.title: Miss Pat - Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her may have passed. Son now owns house. Deceased was avid gardener. Probate/inherited property - son may want to sell. Garden angle is natural warm intro.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son name and contact. Reach out with garden connection first.

priorities.title: Call Pamela Moore
priorities.notes: Military retirement + daughters disability income. $1,700/mo rent currently. VA eligible, zero down. Last contact Apr 29 - had sick grandkid. Follow up was due Apr 30, now overdue.

followUps.text: Call Pamela at 872-822-0656 - check on grandkid first
Confirm timeline and budget for home purchase

priorities.title: Mill Path Closing Push
priorities.sub: Hot Buyers - Make Decision by June
priorities.notes: Second-look buyers are hottest lead on 10023 Mill Path. June deadline for sellers to relocate to NC. Need to convert showing to offer within 1-2 weeks.

followUps.text: Follow up with second-look buyers agent on pre-inspection report
Get feedback from any other recent showings

priorities.title: Priority Bank Utilities & Permits
priorities.notes: Electric reconnected, flooring starting. Water meter pending 1-2 days. Drywall/paint nearly complete. Need utilities finalized to get listing agreement to Priority Bank (Jerry Sadler & Ray Stidham).

followUps.text: Call Medina Electric (866-632-3532) - confirm new meter install status
Call EMCSUD (830-709-3879) - confirm water service setup
Police reports - follow up with authorities on status
Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham

priorities.title: Tilden Land Contract - Close It
priorities.notes: Under contract at $113,000 with Espinoza buyers. Earnest money deposit not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier for third party financing update. Chicago Title escrow open with Alyssa Castillo.

followUps.text: Confirm EMD received from Espinoza buyers
Get signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier
Verify Mrs. Espinoza email address (tmail.com may be typo for gmail.com)

priorities.title: Colton Brown Listing Launch
priorities.sub: 485 W FM 462 Moore - Get Signed & Listed
priorities.notes: 3 bed/2 bath, 4.05 acres, $257K payoff. Divorce situation. Colton interested in contractor work at Priority Bank property. Need updated payoff letter and confirmation on property status before listing goes live.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender
Confirm acreage and renovation completion status
